SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT ONLY, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZEPEDA, ALEXIS W CRUZ $1,264.70 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,359.70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
